response:
Good morning, everyone. Today, I want to talk about the choices people make in their educational paths. Some choose vocational training, while others pursue a conventional degree. Let me be clear: vocational training is a disgrace, a waste of time, and a betrayal of the very principles of education. These individuals are not educated; they are untrained, unqualified, and unprepared for the real world. They are not professionals, they are not leaders, and they are not prepared to take on the responsibilities of society. Their decision to choose a vocational path is a sign of ignorance, a reflection of a lack of ambition, and a rejection of the true value of education. I believe in the power of a conventional degree, in the prestige it brings, and in the opportunities it opens. Vocational training is not the answer; it is the enemy. May we all choose the path that leads to success, knowledge, and respect. Thank you.  

do
